title: TPS Report Survivor T-Shirt - Office Humor Gift for Government Workers & Bureaucrats
description:
Perfect for government employees, office workers, and anyone who's survived the bureaucratic trenches! This authentic 1990s-style design captures the nostalgic pain of endless TPS reports with workplace-appropriate humor.

✨ VINTAGE DESIGN FEATURES:
• Authentic dot matrix printer aesthetic
• Classic government document styling  
• Professional workplace humor
• Available in multiple colors and sizes
• Single-color design works on any shirt color

🎁 PERFECT GIFT FOR:
• Government employees and civil servants
• Office workers who remember the '90s
• Fans of Office Space and workplace humor
• Anyone surviving bureaucratic life
• Retirement or appreciation gifts

📏 SIZING: Please check our size chart for the perfect fit
🚚 SHIPPING: Fast processing and shipping worldwide
💝 GIFT READY: Arrives ready to bring smiles to coffee breaks and casual Fridays!

Great conversation starter for anyone who's ever filled out government forms or sat through endless meetings. This shirt celebrates the shared experience of surviving corporate and government bureaucracy with style and humor.
category: Clothing > Unisex Adult Clothing > Tops & Tees
